Price Includes: —
Remove one layer of shingles down to deck.

Installation of new valley and perimeter flashing (Valley Metal, Drip Edge and Rake Edge).
Installation of new pipe flashing.

Visual inspection of the entire roof deck & roof structure's condition.

Installation of metal vents and metal flapper vents on the roof.

Installation of Malarkey Ice and Water Shield on the perimeter of the whole roof.

Installation of Malarkey Synthetic Underlayment.

Price Includes:

Installation of Malarkey Starter Shingle.

Installation of Limited Lifetime Warranty Malarkey Vista Shingles.

Installation of matching Hip and Ridge and Ridge vents.

Provide a 2 Year Labor Warranty.

Cleaning up all job-related garbage and material.

Installation of 15 plywood sheets and torch down on rear deck.

Installation of Skylight flashing.

Extra plywood, if needed, will be charged at 70$ per piece (2 Plywood sheets are included

in the price.)

Total Project Cost Estimate: $14,800.00

If you have any questions or need adjustments, please contact us at any time.

This Estimate is valid for 30 days from the date of issue.

Customer Acceptance:

By signing below, either by handwritten signature or electronic signature, the customer acknowledges acceptance «
estimate and authorizes the contractor to proceed with the work as described.

Owner.

Date:

This estimate is provided for informational purposes and does not constitute a binding contract until acce
by the customer. The final cost may vary based on actual site conditions, required permits, unforeseen re,
(including replacement of damaged decking or additional plywood), changes in material costs, or custc
requested modifications. All work will comply with applicable Oregon building codes and licensing
requirements. Any additional work or materials not included in this estimate will be billed separately and ¢
itemized on the final invoice.
